message:
fix: completion detector dedup key, redaction websocket/streaming support

Completion detector:
- Dedup key changed from bare beadID to assignmentAttemptKey (beadID +
  pane + assignedAt) so reassigned beads get fresh detection
- pruneExpiredRecentEventsLocked for stale entry cleanup
- Activity tracker keyed by assignment attempt
- Replace fmt.Println with slog.Debug

Redaction middleware:
- Add Hijack/Push/Unwrap methods for WebSocket upgrades and HTTP/2 push
- Fix Flush to write status header before body bytes
- hijacked flag skips finalization on hijacked connections
- Error-check buffered body write

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
